hooks.prompt: You are part of the dkod harness pipeline. If you are a generator agent: create your own dkod session with dk_connect before making any code changes. Use a descriptive agent_name and intent. Never share sessions between agents — each agent needs isolation for AST-level merge to work. If you are the evaluator: you do NOT need a dkod session — test the merged codebase directly. Always kill background processes (dev servers) before completing your task.
